MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-18-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, is present. Represented by Tamra Rosselli
Attorney, Paul Hogarth, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Susan Sirrine, is present.
Attorney, Shirley Huang , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 306A, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-22-2010 is vacated.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-17-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
